If you have any questions, please let us know by texting or emailing or calling Monday to Friday 7am to 6pm. WE’RE LOCAL We service Blacktown LGA and surrounding suburbs and our Handymen are police checked and fully insured for your complete peace of mind. Our local handymen can handle almost any property maintenance task – from general repairs to painting, roofing, carpentry, tiling and even kitchen and bathroom renovations. Best of all, at Handyman Blacktown Services we offer quotes.
Follow this link to write a Google review. https://g. page/r/CYl4h_HdIxfxEBM/review Copyright © Handyman Blacktown Services. All Rights Reserved. Follow us on facebook , twitter , and instagram.
googleusercontent.

Whether its general handyman repairs or more complex renovation and maintenance, your local Handyman can do it all. Fully insured and work guaranteed Police checked For all your building and construction needs Experienced tradesman with many years of experience. Able repair walls, taps, minor electrical problems, shaving and trimming doors, landscaping, pressure washing, hanging shelves and other materials, can fix pergolas and can fit shower heads.

Fencing and repairing capabilities at hand as well. Professional and reliable handyman and painting services. plumbing, gyprock and plasterboard repair/patching, window and door locks. Small jobs. Furniture assembly. playground installation. Landscaping. Retaining walls. Curtains and blinds all types. timber structure, vinyl feature walls. All your painting needs. I can install, repair or replace anything around your home or business.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Handyman Blacktown Services — a Sydney-based company providing professional carpentry services including custom cabinetry, timber decking, door & window installation, kitchen renovations, bathroom renovations, pergolas, fencing, and general carpentry & maintenance.

Contact: Phone: +61 421 330 908 | Email: handymanblacktown@gmail.com | Website: https://www.handymanblacktown.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

CRITICAL LANGUAGE RULE: You MUST respond ONLY in English. Use Australian English spelling and expressions (e.g. "colour" not "color", "organisation" not "organization", "no worries", "mate"). NEVER respond in any other language regardless of what language the user writes in. If a user writes in another language, respond in English and politely let them know you can only assist in English.

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly with a warm Australian tone
- If unsure, suggest contacting +61 421 330 908
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail is needed)
- Help visitors book services, get quotes, and learn about the company
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to Handyman Blacktown Services! How can we help you today?
